hypotheses.name: SV axis specificity: STRING PPI co-pole on SV1 vs SV2 vs SV3
hypotheses.method: SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embeddings at each of 12 layers. For SV1, SV2, SV3: classify top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 pole genes. Compute co-pole rate for 1022 STRING PPI pairs (score>=0.7). Compare to N=500 random-pair null. Report z-score per axis per layer.
hypotheses.next_action: Annotate SV3 poles with GO enrichment to identify biological meaning. Report SV2+SV3 as joint PPI geometry axes.

hypotheses.name: Repression anti-pole: TRRUST repression pairs occupy opposite SV2 poles
hypotheses.method: SV2 projections at each layer. For TRRUST activation (N=113) and repression (N=62) pairs: compute co-pole rate (both in same pole) and cross-pole rate (genes in opposite poles). Compare to N=500 random-pair null. Test if repression cross-pole > null.
hypotheses.result_value: rep_xpole mean z=-1.41, 0/12 layers significant; act_copole mean z=3.18 (12/12 sig)
hypotheses.next_action: Retire. Regulatory sign (activation vs repression) is not encoded as SV2 pole opposition.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: Definitive negative: rep_xpole z=-1.41 mean across all 12 layers, 0/12 significant.

hypotheses.name: Hub-degree control: does PPI co-pole signal survive in low-degree gene pairs?
hypotheses.method: Compute STRING degree for each named gene. Split 1022 pairs into hub (degree > median=7) and non-hub edges. Run SV2 co-pole test on each subset. Null: N=300 random pairs per subset.
hypotheses.result_value: hub mean z=10.01 (12/12 sig), non-hub mean z=1.43 (3/12 sig, N=35 pairs only)
hypotheses.next_action: Lower STRING threshold to score>=0.4 to expand non-hub edge set (~5-10x more). Re-test hub vs non-hub with adequate power.
